data.title: Steadright Signs MOU for Strategic Titanium Project in Morocco
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Steadright Critical Minerals, Inc. ( (TSE:SCM) ) has issued an update.

Steadright Critical Minerals Inc. has signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with NSM Capital for the TitanBeach Titanium Project in Morocco, which covers 160 square kilometers of highly prospective Titanium Dioxide exploration licenses. This move positions Steadright to potentially earn up to an 80% stake in the project, capitalizing on the growing demand for critical minerals amidst global supply chain disruptions and rising raw material costs. The project benefits from Morocco’s favorable mining jurisdiction, including a 5-year tax-free incentive for mineral producers, enhancing the project’s economic viability and strategic importance.

Spark’s Take on TSE:SCM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:SCM is a Underperform.

Steadright Critical Minerals, Inc. exhibits severe financial weaknesses, with no revenue, negative equity, and poor cash flow management. Technical analysis suggests overbought conditions, which could lead to a price correction. Valuation is challenging due to the absence of earnings, contributing to a low overall score.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:SCM stock, click here.

More about Steadright Critical Minerals, Inc.

Steadright Critical Minerals Inc. is a mineral exploration company established in 2019, focusing on projects within the critical mineral space. The company holds an option on the RAM property in Quebec, which is rich in Ni, Cu, Co, and precious metals.

Average Trading Volume: 46,881

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

See more insights into SCM stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

National Grid Transco ( (NGG) ) has shared an announcement.

On June 5, 2025, National Grid announced the scrip dividend reference price for its 2024/25 final dividend. The reference price for ordinary shareholders is set at 1,040.40 pence, while for American Depositary Receipt holders, it is US$70.3102. This announcement is part of the company’s dividend timetable, which includes key dates such as the ex-dividend date and the scrip election date. The scrip dividend scheme allows shareholders to receive dividends in the form of additional shares, potentially impacting shareholder value and investment strategies.

data.title: MeglioQuesto Secures Capital Increase Backing from Borgosesia
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

The latest update is out from Meglioquesto S.P.A. ( (IT:MQSPA) ).

MeglioQuesto S.p.A. has accepted a proposal from Borgosesia Alternative to guarantee the subscription of any unsubscribed shares as part of a capital increase under its recovery plan. This move, involving a total capital increase of 5 million euros, aims to stabilize the company’s financial position and ensure the successful execution of its recovery strategy. The arrangement includes conditions to prevent Borgosesia from exceeding a 30% voting rights threshold and involves a revolving loan to support operational activities.

More about Meglioquesto S.P.A.

MeglioQuesto S.p.A. is a phygital marketplace that integrates physical and digital channels to offer services and products to consumers and partner companies. Operating in Italy since 2011, it is listed on the Euronext Growth Milan market and collaborates with top-tier companies in telecommunications, energy, financial, and insurance sectors.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: €11.37M

For a thorough assessment of MQSPA stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Dr. Reddy’s and Alvotech Collaborate on Keytruda Biosimilar
data.description:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions

Dr Reddy’s Laboratories ( (RDY) ) has issued an announcement.

On June 5, 2025, Dr. Reddy’s Laboratories announced a collaboration with Alvotech to co-develop a biosimilar candidate to Keytruda® (pembrolizumab), a leading cancer treatment. This partnership aims to leverage both companies’ expertise in biosimilars to accelerate development and expand global market reach. The collaboration is expected to enhance Dr. Reddy’s capabilities in oncology, a key focus area, and provide cost-effective treatment options worldwide.

The most recent analyst rating on (RDY) stock is a Buy with a $17.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Dr Reddy’s Laboratories stock, see the RDY Stock Forecast page.

Dr Reddy’s Laboratories receives a solid overall score due to its strong financial performance, especially in revenue growth and balance sheet stability. Technical indicators show positive momentum, although the stock is below its long-term average. Valuation is reasonable, but dividend yield is low. The recent earnings call was positive, highlighting growth and strategic advancements despite some market challenges.

To see Spark’s full report on RDY stock, click here.

More about Dr Reddy’s Laboratories

Dr. Reddy’s Laboratories is a multinational pharmaceutical company based in Hyderabad, India. The company specializes in the development, manufacture, and marketing of a wide range of pharmaceutical products, including biosimilars, which are biologic medical products highly similar to already approved reference products. Dr. Reddy’s focuses on providing affordable and innovative medicines to patients globally, with a strong emphasis on oncology and other critical therapeutic areas.

An announcement from Luxxfolio Holdings Inc ( (TSE:LUXX) ) is now available.

Luxxfolio Holdings Inc. has successfully uplisted to the OTCQB Venture Market, a move that enhances its visibility and accessibility to U.S. investors. This uplisting is expected to increase the company’s exposure in the U.S. capital markets, supporting its efforts to attract both institutional and retail investors interested in Litecoin. Additionally, Luxxfolio announced the appointment of Stephanie Sharma as Corporate Secretary, following the resignation of Maria Foran. This strategic transition aligns with Luxxfolio’s goals of increasing shareholder value and expanding its presence in the digital asset and technology sectors.

More about Luxxfolio Holdings Inc

Luxxfolio Holdings Inc. is a digital infrastructure and technology company focused on enabling crypto-powered commerce, particularly within the Litecoin blockchain ecosystem. The company is involved in developing and investing in on-chain technologies that facilitate real-world cryptocurrency applications, such as stablecoin payments, merchant processing, and self-custody wallets. Luxxfolio’s long-term vision includes a Litecoin treasury strategy to promote mainstream adoption of cryptocurrency for everyday transactions.

data.title: JBDI Holdings Reports Significant Financial Loss for 2024
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

The latest update is out from JBDI Holdings Limited ( (JBDI) ).

On June 5, 2025, JBDI Holdings Limited released its unaudited interim condensed financial statements for the six months ended November 30, 2024, revealing a significant downturn. The company reported a net loss of approximately $1.6 million, a stark contrast to the net income of $0.4 million in the same period the previous year. This decline was primarily due to a 7.8% decrease in revenue, attributed to reduced demand for reconditioned containers in Singapore and Malaysia, coupled with professional fees related to initial public offerings. The financial results indicate a challenging period for JBDI Holdings, impacting its market position and signaling potential concerns for stakeholders.

More about JBDI Holdings Limited

JBDI Holdings Limited operates in the chemical and oil and gas industries, focusing on the sales of reconditioned and new containers, reconditioning services, waste water equipment services, and sales of recycled materials. The company primarily serves markets in Singapore, Indonesia, Malaysia, and other countries.

Average Trading Volume: 543,228

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

For an in-depth examination of JBDI stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Big Red Mining Corp ( (TSE:ATMY) ) just unveiled an update.

Antimony Resources Corp. has successfully closed the final tranche of a non-brokered private placement, raising $318,100 to support property exploration, investor relations, and general working capital. Additionally, the company has engaged Stockhouse Publishing Ltd. for advertising services and announced the results of its 2025 shareholders’ meeting, where all resolutions were approved, including the election of directors and the re-appointment of its auditor. These developments are expected to enhance the company’s operational capabilities and strengthen its market positioning.
